case_title: ANDY LEE ET AL VS. RANDY SANCHEZ PEREZ ET AL

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-22-2017 - JUDGMENT.

AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $500.00 FILED BY LEE, ANDY LEE, WEI BIN AS TO DEFENDANT PEREZ, RANDY SANCHEZ ALLIANCE BUSINESS & COMMERCIAL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-22-2017 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEE, ANDY LEE, WEI BIN AS TO DEFENDANT PEREZ, RANDY SANCHEZ

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEE, ANDY LEE, WEI BIN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PEREZ, RANDY SANCHEZ $500.00 PRINCIPAL, $45.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $545.00, AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST ALLIANCE BUSINESS AND COMMERICAL IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS NO PROOF OF SERVICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JAN-05-2017, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PEREZ, RANDY SANCHEZ

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-22-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-22-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFFS ANDY LEE AND WEI BIB LEE ARE PRESENT. DEFENDANT RADDY SANCHEZ PEREZ IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT ALLIANCE BUSINESS AND COMMERCIAL IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFFS DID NOT SERVE DEFENDANT ALLIANCE BUSINESS AND COMMERCIAL AND REQUESTS A DISMISSAL. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
